titles.title: I Just Can't Give Up Now

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There will be mountains That I will have to climb And there will be battles That I will have to fight But victory or defeat It's up to me to decide But how can I expect to win If I never try

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I just can't give up now I come to far from where i started from Nobody told me the road would be easy And I don't believe He`s brought me this far to leave me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Never said there wouldn't be trials Never said I wouldn't fall Never said that everything would go The way I want it to go But when my back is against the wall And I feel all hope is gone I'll just lift my head up to the sky And say help me to be strong, oh

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, I know You didn't bring me Out here to leave me lonely, oh no Even when I can't see clearly I know that You are with me so I can't
